subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Distraction and Attention
description: A quick, practical guide to Distraction and Attention.

hook.text: A text message takes your eyes off work for 5 seconds. At a construction site, that's enough to die.

buildup.text: Human attention is limited. We can only focus on one complex task at a time.

discovery.text: Inattentional blindness means you can look directly at a hazard and not see it if distracted.

twist.text: Multitasking doesn't exist—the brain switches between tasks, losing focus on each one.

climax.text: Phone-free zones in hazardous areas reduce injury rates measurably.

punchline.text: You can't text and stay alive in a hazardous area. Pick one.

quiz.question: What is inattentional blindness?
options: Looking directly at something but not seeing it due to distraction
Losing vision temporarily from bright light
